Name: Minimum time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission when it occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission for cases where activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the next activity performed by the same sender
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the end of case grouped by the last value of sender

Name: Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation Cycle Time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases requiring revision
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and activity Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation for cases where activity Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurs

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Minimum time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion when order is reversed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion for cases where activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion occurs

Name: Average time for Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation compared to average time for Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed compared to average time from Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation to RW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to final decision (Accept/Reject) in the longest variant
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Accept occurs

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Manuscript is Withdrawn
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript is Withdrawn'

Name: Time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist'

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to the first reviewer invitation event (SW-AE Assign Reviewers or similar)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'
